across.clue: Exclamation of surprise — like reactions to Intel stock surging 23% in a single day
Like the sailors who repaired ships far from home, per new archaeology findings
Start of a complaint — like what Meta employees are saying about '28 Days of Hell' amid 20,000 job cuts
Core principle — like the DOJ's position that Trump's asylum border ban is illegal, per appeals court ruling
Fathers — like those of USF doctoral students whose bodies are being searched for near Tampa

down.clue: Legal order — like the one a federal court issued letting Texas's new immigration law take effect
Gasped in awe — like stargazers reacting to Hubble's 36th-anniversary image of the Trifid Nebula
Appliance brand — like the heated socks brand Costco recalled after 200,000 units caused burns
Despised — like what 82% of WBD shareholders said about David Zaslav's merger payout
Catches — like what a U.S. destroyer did to an Iran blockade runner, shooting out its engine
